title: Rice Blast Disease
user_query: My rice plants have white spots on leaves, what is this?
user_query_ml: എന്റെ നെല്ലിലകളിൽ വെളുത്ത പാടുകൾ ഉണ്ട്, ഇത് എന്താണ്?
problem: Fungal infection attacking rice leaves and stems
symptoms: White or grayish spots with dark borders on leaves, lesions on stems, plants turn yellow and die
cause: Magnaporthe oryzae fungus thrives in humid conditions
solution: 1. Remove and burn infected plants. 2. Spray tricyclazole or mancozeb fungicide every 10 days. 3. Apply at tillering and panicle stages. 4. Improve drainage.
prevention: Use resistant varieties like IR36, avoid excess nitrogen, plant at right time
weather_condition: High humidity and rain during monsoon
notes: Check fields early morning when dew is present

title: Rice Stem Borer
user_query: Rice stems are drying up from inside, larvae inside?
user_query_ml: നെല്ലിന്റെ തണ്ടുകൾ里面 നിന്ന് ഉണങ്ങുന്നു, പുഴുക്കൾ ഉണ്ടോ?
problem: Larvae bore into stems causing dead hearts
symptoms: Young plants show dead central leaf, stems break easily, white powdery frass at base
cause: Scirpophaga incertulas moth lays eggs on leaves
solution: 1. Set light traps at night. 2. Spray chlorpyrifos 2 ml per liter water. 3. Destroy stubble after harvest. 4. Release Trichogramma wasps.
prevention: Clip leaf tips with eggs before hatching, use resistant varieties
weather_condition: Warm humid nights in monsoon start
notes: Pheromone traps work best near fields

title: Bacterial Leaf Blight
user_query: Leaves turning white from tip, rice crop wilting?
user_query_ml: ഇലകൾ അറ്റത്ത് നിന്ന് വെളുപ്പി മാറുന്നു, നെല്ല് വാലുപിടിക്കുന്നു?
problem: Bacterial infection spreads in wet conditions
symptoms: Water-soaked lesions on leaf tips, turns white, wavy margins, wilting
cause: Xanthomonas oryzae bacteria enter through wounds
solution: 1. Drain standing water. 2. Spray copper oxychloride 3g/liter. 3. Avoid overhead irrigation. 4. Remove weeds.
prevention: Plant disease-free seeds, space plants properly
weather_condition: Heavy rain and wind in monsoon
notes: Apply antibiotics like streptocycline if severe

title: Banana Weevil Borer
user_query: Banana plants falling over, holes in pseudostem?
problem: Grubs bore into pseudostem causing collapse
symptoms: Holes with frass at base, pseudostem splits, plants topple
cause: Cosmopolites sordidus beetle larvae feeding inside
solution: 1. Cut and burn affected plants. 2. Apply chlorpyrifos dust around base. 3. Use neem cake 200g/plant. 4. Trap adults with pseudostem pieces.
prevention: Destroy old plants completely, use clean suckers
notes: Check new plantings weekly for early signs

title: Sigatoka Leaf Spot
user_query: Black spots on banana leaves spreading fast?
symptoms: Yellow halos around brown-black spots on lower leaves, spots merge
solution: 1. Remove old infected leaves. 2. Spray propiconazole 1ml/liter every 15 days. 3. Improve air circulation by spacing.
prevention: Use resistant varieties, avoid overhead water

title: Rhinoceros Beetle
user_query: Holes in coconut crown, grubs eating palm heart?
problem: Grubs damage growing point of palm
symptoms: V-shaped cuts on leaves, holes in crown with frass, stunted growth
solution: 1. Pour carbaryl 50g + water in holes. 2. Set pheromone traps. 3. Apply neem oil on crown. 4. Destroy breeding sites.
prevention: Clean farm waste piles, use virus-infected grubs
notes: Shake palms gently to dislodge adults

title: Bud Rot Disease
user_query: Coconut bud turning black and rotting?
problem: Fungal rot of the spear leaf
symptoms: Bud turns brown-black, wilts, emits foul smell, palm dies
solution: 1. Cut and burn infected bud. 2. Apply Bordeaux mixture on cut surface. 3. Improve drainage. 4. Spray metalaxyl.
prevention: Avoid water stagnation, select healthy seedlings

title: Rubber Leaf Caterpillar
user_query: Rubber leaves eaten skeleton, black caterpillars?
symptoms: Leaves with only veins left, black hairy caterpillars, webbing
solution: 1. Handpick caterpillars early morning. 2. Spray quinalphos 2ml/liter. 3. Burn fallen leaves. 4. Use light traps.
prevention: Plant border crops like cassava, encourage birds
notes: Natural enemies like wasp reduce population

title: Powdery Mildew
user_query: White powder on new rubber leaves?
symptoms: White powdery coating on young leaves, crinkled deformed growth
cause: Oidium heveae fungus in cool weather
solution: 1. Prune crowded branches. 2. Spray sulphur 2g/liter or diniconazole. 3. Repeat after 10 days.

title: Mealybugs on Pepper
user_query: White cottony insects on pepper vines?
user_query_ml: കുരുമുളക് നാറ്റിൽ വെളുത്ത പരുത്ത് പോലുള്ള പുഴുക്കൾ?
symptoms: White waxy mealybugs on stems and nodes, sooty mold, yellowing
solution: 1. Prune heavily infested parts. 2. Spray dimethoate 2ml/liter. 3. Apply neem oil weekly. 4. Introduce Cryptolaemus beetle.

title: Quick Wilt Disease
symptoms: Yellowing leaves, vine wilts from tip, root rot, collapses
solution: 1. Uproot and burn affected vines. 2. Drench soil with metalaxyl + mancozeb. 3. Plant new in raised beds. 4. Solarize soil.

title: Cardamom Thrips
problem: Tiny insects damaging flower and capsules
symptoms: Silver streaks on leaves, shriveled deformed capsules, black thrips
solution: 1. Remove weeds. 2. Spray imidacloprid 0.5ml/liter. 3. Use blue sticky traps. 4. Destroy crop residue.

title: Capsule Rot
symptoms: Pods turn dark brown, shrivel, drop prematurely
solution: 1. Remove infected pods. 2. Spray carbendazim 2g/liter. 3. Improve ventilation by thinning. 4. Apply potash.

title: Fruit Borer in Brinjal
user_query: Holes in brinjal fruits with worms inside?
symptoms: Entry holes with frass, fruit rot, larvae inside
solution: 1. Remove affected fruits. 2. Spray cypermethrin 1ml/liter. 3. Use pheromone traps. 4. Clip shoots.

title: Early Blight Tomato
user_query: Tomato leaves have concentric rings spots?
symptoms: Dark spots with concentric rings on lower leaves, defoliation
solution: 1. Remove lower leaves. 2. Spray mancozeb 3g/liter. 3. Stake plants for air flow. 4. Mulch soil.

title: Brown Plant Hopper
user_query: Rice plants yellowing burning from edges?
problem: Sucking pest transmits virus and hopper burn
symptoms: Yellowing from leaf tip, plants dry up, hopper crowds
solution: 1. Use light traps. 2. Spray buprofezin 1g/liter. 3. Plant resistant varieties. 4. Avoid dense planting.

title: Panama Wilt Banana
user_query: Whole banana patch wilting one by one?
symptoms: Petiole splits, leaves collapse, vascular discoloration
solution: 1. Uproot burn entire plant. 2. Solarize soil 45 days. 3. Plant tissue culture plants. 4. Use Trichoderma.

title: Red Palm Weevil
user_query_ml: തെങ്ങ് തണ്ട് ഉള്ളിൽ ശൂന്യം, പേസ്റ്റ് പുറത്ത്?
problem: Grubs bore trunk causing palm death
symptoms: Gum exudation from trunk, tunneling sound, crown wilts
solution: 1. Inject monocrotophos in trunk. 2. Pheromone traps. 3. Cut palms beyond repair. 4. Paint cuts with insecticide.
notes: Tap trunk to hear hollow sound

title: Abnormal Leaf Fall
user_query: Rubber leaves falling prematurely brown margins?
symptoms: Small angular spots coalesce, leaves drop
solution: 1. Rake and burn fallen leaves. 2. Spray copper oxychloride. 3. Apply potash fertilizer.

title: Pepper Weevil
user_query: Spikes drying up before berries form?
symptoms: Dropped flowers, grubs in spikes, spike wilting
solution: 1. Shake vines collect weevils. 2. Spray malathion 2ml/liter. 3. Pit traps with bran.

title: Chirke Disease
symptoms: Mosaic mottling, leaf crinkle, stunted plants
cause: Cardamom mosaic virus katte virus vector
solution: 1. Rogue out infected plants. 2. Control aphids with imidacloprid. 3. Use virus-free planting material.

title: Aphids on Chilli
symptoms: Clusters of green aphids, leaf curl, sooty mold
solution: 1. Spray neem oil 5ml/liter. 2. Introduce ladybird beetles. 3. High pressure water spray.

title: Sheath Blight
user_query: Rice stems have white cottony growth near water?
user_query_ml: നെല്ല് തണ്ടുകളിൽ വെളുത്ത പരുത്ത് നിലം തൊട്ട്?
symptoms: White cottony mycelium on sheath, girdling lesions
cause: Rhizoctonia solani in dense flooded fields
solution: 1. Apply validamycin 2ml/liter spray. 2. Reduce nitrogen late. 3. Improve spacing.

title: Downy Mildew Cucumber
user_query: Cucumber leaves yellow with gray mold underside?
user_query_ml: വെച്ചാര ഇലകൾ മുകളിൽ മഞ്ഞ, താഴ് വെളുത്ത പൂപ്പൽ?
symptoms: Yellow angular spots upper, gray mold lower surface
solution: 1. Improve ventilation. 2. Spray mancozeb + metalaxyl. 3. Avoid overhead irrigation.

title: Rubber Mite
solution: 1. Sulfur spray 2g/liter. 2. Wettable sulphur dust. 3. Increase humidity.

title: Stem Bleeding
user_query: Brown liquid oozing from coconut trunk cracks?
user_query_ml: തെങ്ങ് തണ്ടിൽ നിന്ന് പുളിപ്പുള്ള നീർ പുറത്ത്?
symptoms: Fermented liquid from trunk slits, cracks, foul smell
solution: 1. Clean wound remove rotten tissue. 2. Apply fungicide paste. 3. Paint with coal tar.

title: Scale Insects Pepper
user_query: Pepper stems covered with hard brown scales?
user_query_ml: കുരുമുളക് തണ്ടിൽ കട്ടിയുള്ള പച്ച നിറം പാടുകൾ?
symptoms: Hard brown scales on stems, yellowing wilting shoots
solution: 1. Prune infested shoots. 2. Spray dimethoate or fish oil soap. 3. Wipe with alcohol.

title: Nitrogen Deficiency Rice
user_query: Rice plants pale yellow stunted growth?
problem: Lack of nitrogen for green growth
symptoms: Pale green to yellow older leaves, stunted thin plants, poor tillering
cause: Leaching in rainy season, low organic matter
solution: 1. Apply urea 20kg/acre as top dress at tillering. 2. Split apply in 3 doses. 3. Mix with neem cake. 4. Drain water before applying.
prevention: Green manure before planting, use slow release urea

title: Potassium Deficiency Banana
symptoms: Orange-brown scorching leaf margins, bunch small, fruits angular
cause: Sandy soils low K, heavy rain leaching
solution: 1. Apply MOP 50g/plant every 2 months. 2. Foliar KNO3 5g/liter. 3. Add wood ash around base. 4. Water after application.

title: Soil Acidity Rubber
symptoms: Stunted growth, mottled leaves, poor latex yield
cause: High rainfall leaching bases, organic matter decomposition
solution: 1. Test soil pH. 2. Apply lime 2 ton/ha if pH<5.5. 3. Mix in top 15cm soil. 4. Retest after 6 months.
prevention: Regular lime every 3 years, add dolomite

title: Coconut Fertilizer Schedule
user_query: Coconut nuts small not filling properly?
symptoms: Small nuts, button shedding, yellow fronds
cause: Lump application instead of split doses
solution: 1. Apply 50N-40P-120K-1.5Mg kg/palm/year split 3 times. 2. Dig circular basins 1.8m radius. 3. Cover with green leaves. 4. Irrigate.

title: Phosphorus Deficiency Pepper
problem: P shortage for root and spike development
symptoms: Dark green leaves, thin stems, poor flowering
cause: Acid soils fix P as insoluble compounds
solution: 1. Apply SSP 100g/vine basal. 2. Rock phosphate 200g for acid soils. 3. Foliar 19:19:19 5g/liter. 4. Mulch with FYM.

title: Magnesium Deficiency Cardamom
symptoms: Interveinal yellowing older leaves, green veins
cause: Leaching in heavy rain, low soil Mg
solution: 1. Apply kieserite 100g/plant. 2. Foliar MgSO4 20g/10liter. 3. Add dolomite lime.

title: Waterlogging Rice Soil
user_query: Rice yellowing roots rotting in field?
symptoms: Yellow leaves, stunted growth, foul soil smell
cause: Clay soils poor percolation, blocked drains
solution: 1. Deep plough before planting. 2. Make alternate wetting drying. 3. Clean field bunds drains. 4. Add gypsum 500kg/ha.

title: Banana Over Fertilization
user_query: Banana leaves burning tips after manure?
symptoms: Leaf tip burn, stunted growth, salt crust soil
cause: Too much urea/chicken manure at once
solution: 1. Flush with plenty water. 2. Reduce next dose 50%. 3. Apply in ring away from pseudostem. 4. Add organic matter.

title: Calcium Deficiency Tomato
symptoms: Black sunken lesion at blossom end of fruit
cause: Irregular watering, high N, acid soil
solution: 1. Mulch soil maintain moisture. 2. Foliar CaNO3 5g/liter. 3. Lime soil pH 6.5. 4. Reduce N fertilizer.
notes: Fruit safe to eat if cut

title: Soil pH Testing Kerala
user_query: How to check if soil too acid?
problem: Unknown soil pH causing poor growth
solution: 1. Collect soil 15-20cm depth 10 spots. 2. Mix send to Krishi Vigyan Kendra. 3. Use pH meter kit. 4. Test every 2 years.

title: Organic Coconut Manuring
user_query: Can I use only cowdung for coconut?
symptoms: Slow growth, small nuts, button drop
solution: 1. FYM 50kg + compost 50kg/palm/year. 2. Add neem cake 5kg for N. 3. Bone meal 2kg for P. 4. Wood ash 10kg for K.

title: Zinc Deficiency Rice
user_query: Khaira disease rice leaves white streaks?
problem: Zinc shortage in alkaline flooded soil
symptoms: White streaks brown blotches on young leaves
solution: 1. ZnSO4 25kg/ha basal. 2. Foliar ZnSO4 0.5% + urea. 3. Green manure.

title: Pepper Soil Mound
user_query: Pepper vines declining base soil poor?
symptoms: Exposed roots, vine instability, poor spikes
solution: 1. Earth up soil 30cm mound around base. 2. Mulch with coconut husk. 3. Plant cover crops. 4. Contour trenches.

title: Rubber Immature Fert
user_query: Young rubber slow growth paneling poor?
symptoms: Thin canopy, small leaves, delayed paneling
cause: Adult tapping fertilizer on young plants
solution: 1. Year 1-3: 50g N 25g P 100g K/plant/year split 4 times. 2. Increase yearly. 3. Apply in circle 1m radius.

title: Nitrogen Deficiency Cardamom
user_query: Cardamom plants light green poor tillers?
symptoms: Light green foliage, few tillers, small plants
cause: Low soil N leaching heavy rain
solution: 1. Ammonium sulphate 100g/clump split 3 doses. 2. FYM 10kg/clump. 3. Mulch leaf litter.

title: Banana Pit Filling
solution: 1. Dig 45x45x45cm pit. 2. Fill topsoil+FYM 10kg+neem cake 1kg. 3. Plant in center. 4. Stake immediately.

title: Veg Drip Fertigation
symptoms: Root tip burn, wilting, poor growth
solution: 1. Use water soluble 19:19:19 2g/liter drip. 2. Split daily small doses. 3. Maintain EC<2.0. 4. Leach periodically.

title: Manganese Deficiency Coconut
solution: 1. MnSO4 500g/palm soil drench. 2. Foliar 0.5% MnSO4.

title: Green Manure Rice
symptoms: Hard soil, poor tilth, weed problems
solution: 1. Broadcast sesbania seeds 15kg/ha 45 days before rice. 2. Plough in green at flowering. 3. Add 6 ton/ha FYM.

title: Pepper NPK Ratio
solution: 1. Mature vines: 100g N 50g P 200g K/vine/year. 2. Split 4 equal doses. 3. Apply in July Oct Feb May.

title: Iron Deficiency Rubber
user_query: Rubber young leaves yellow veins green?
user_query_ml: റബ്ബർ പുതിയ ഇലകൾ മഞ്ഞ, നാഡി പച്ച?
problem: Fe chlorosis in high pH soil
solution: 1. Ferrous sulphate 50g + lime 50g/plant drench. 2. Foliar Fe chelate.

title: Cardamom Mulching
user_query: Cardamom soil drying fast weeds many?
symptoms: Dry soil surface, weed smothering, wilting
solution: 1. Apply dry leaves 10cm thick around clumps. 2. Coconut husk pieces. 3. Remove weeds first. 4. Renew yearly.

title: FYM Composting
symptoms: Raw smell, weed seeds, uneven decomposition
solution: 1. Pile 1m high alternate green dry. 2. Add 2% DP. 3. Turn every 15 days. 4. Ready in 45 days no smell.

title: Boron Deficiency Bottle Gourd
symptoms: Hollow fruits, brittle stems, fruit crack
solution: 1. Borax 10g/10liter foliar. 2. Soil 20kg/ha.

title: Coconut Basin Making
solution: 1. Dig basin 1.8m radius 20cm deep around trunk. 2. Apply fert in basin. 3. Cover green leaves. 4. Fill after monsoon.

title: Urea Application Mistake
solution: 1. Drain water 1 day. 2. Mix sand broadcast. 3. Light irrigation after. 4. Split doses.

title: Rice Overwatering
symptoms: Yellow leaves, stunted growth, foul smell from roots
solution: 1. Drain field completely 2 days. 2. Alternate wetting drying 5cm water only. 3. Check percolation. 4. Resume shallow irrigation.

title: Late Rice Sowing
user_query: Planted rice late now pests coming?
symptoms: Heavy stem borer, hopper attack early
solution: 1. Synchronize with neighbors May 15-30. 2. Use short duration varieties. 3. Seed treatment imidacloprid. 4. Early transplant 25 days.

title: Early Rice Harvest
user_query: Cut rice early grains not filled?
symptoms: Green grains, low weight, poor quality
solution: 1. Wait 30-35 days after 90% panicle golden. 2. Test milk line gone. 3. Moisture 20-22%. 4. Field dry harvest.

title: Spray Before Rain Rice
user_query: Rain coming should I spray fungicide now?
solution: 1. Spray 2 hours before light rain only. 2. Use systemic fungicide. 3. Morning 9-11am best. 4. Check 5 day forecast.

title: Banana Water Stress
symptoms: Leaf rolling, edge burn, small bunch
solution: 1. Drip 20 liter/plant/day fruiting stage. 2. Basin irrigation 60 liter/week. 3. Mulch conserve soil water. 4. Check soil 30cm depth.

title: Wrong Seed Rate
symptoms: Tall thin stems, poor root, damping off
solution: 1. Tomato 200g/ha seeds. 2. Sow thin 2cm apart. 3. Tray method single seed. 4. Prick out day 10.

title: Banana Maturity Harvest
symptoms: Angular fruits, split fingers, fruit drop
solution: 1. Harvest 75% maturity 11-12 month. 2. Angular shoulders. 3. Bunch cover 3 weeks before. 4. Top bunch 1.2m.

title: Pepper Spray Rain Delay
user_query: Heavy rain 3 days, spray thrips now?
solution: 1. Wait 2 days dry weather. 2. Spray imidacloprid evening. 3. Add sticker 1ml/liter. 4. Repeat 10 days.

title: Coconut Summer Irrigation
solution: 1. Drip 40 liter/palm/day summer. 2. Bowl irrigation 65 liter/week. 3. Mulch basin. 4. Fertigation K high.

title: Rubber Seedling Hardening
user_query: Rubber polybag plants dying after field?
solution: 1. Shade net 50% 15 days before. 2. Withhold water 3 days harden. 3. Gradual sun exposure. 4. Plant rainy day.

title: Coconut Maturity Stage
solution: 1. Tall palms 53 days cycle. 2. Dwarf 36 days. 3. 12 noon harvest avoid rain. 4. Mark good bearing bunches.

title: Rubber Tapping Rain
user_query: Rain morning, tap rubber panel today?
user_query_ml: രാവിലെ മഴ, ഇന്ന് റബ്ബർ ടാപ്പ് ചെയ്യണോ?
solution: 1. Skip if rain >2mm morning. 2. Use rain guard canopy. 3. Dry panel tapping start. 4. Stimulant avoid wet.

title: Pepper Dry Spell
solution: 1. Drip 10 liter/vine/day. 2. Basin 50 liter/week. 3. Mulch husk conserve. 4. Fertigate K.

title: Cardamom Seed Sowing
solution: 1. Fresh seed May collection. 2. Soak 24hr alternate water shade. 3. Sand bed 50% shade. 4. Germinate 60-90 days.

title: Cardamom Capsule Maturity
symptoms: Split capsules, seed drop, color loss
solution: 1. Harvest 1/3 green 2/3 yellow stage. 2. 40-45 days spike open. 3. Clip whole spike. 4. Dry shade 10% moisture.

title: Veg Transplant Rain
user_query: Heavy rain forecast, transplant tomato now?
solution: 1. Wait soil workable 2 days dry. 2. Raised bed planting. 3. Poly cover seedlings. 4. Check percolation.

title: Tomato Cracking
solution: 1. Mulch plastic conserve moisture. 2. Regular light irrigation. 3. Harvest early fruit. 4. K fert prevent.

title: Seed Treatment Fungus
solution: 1. Carbendazim 2g/kg seed 24hr soak. 2. Raised nursery bed. 3. Sand sterilized. 4. Light shade.

title: Pepper Berry Maturity
solution: 1. Harvest 1/3 red 2/3 orange stage. 2. Spike basis maturity. 3. Blanch hot water. 4. Dry 8-10% moisture.

title: Coconut Harvest Rain
solution: 1. Use pole picker avoid climb. 2. Wait 2 days dry weather. 3. Ground crew safety. 4. Harness mandatory.

title: Cardamom Shade Irrigation
solution: 1. Micro sprinkler 5 liter/clump/day. 2. Leaf litter mulch 10cm. 3. Thin canopy 40% light. 4. Morning evening water.

title: Bhendi Seed Depth
solution: 1. Sow 1cm depth dibbling. 2. Cover thin soil. 3. Light irrigation. 4. Germinate 5-7 days.

title: Rubber Latex Coagulation
user_query: Rubber latex clotting cup not flowing?
solution: 1. Change panel V6 1/2 D. 2. Ethephon 1% stimulate. 3. Clean spout. 4. Ammonia preserve.

title: Monsoon Planting Delay
solution: 1. Short duration varieties only. 2. Raised beds 30cm. 3. Flood tolerant crops. 4. Early varieties.

title: Drip Clogging
solution: 1. Acid flush HCl 0.5% weekly. 2. Screen filter 120 mesh. 3. Flush lines monthly. 4. Check pressure 2kg.

title: Chilli Harvest Timing
solution: 1. Pick color break stage 70% red. 2. 3 pickings week. 3. Stake support. 4. GA3 spray reduce.

title: PM-KISAN Registration

user_query_ml: പിഎം കിസാൻ 6000 രൂപയ്ക്ക് എങ്ങനെ രജിസ്റ്റർ ചെയ്യാം?
solution: 1. Visit pmkisan.gov.in. 2. Click 'Farmer Corner' 'New Farmer Registration'. 3. Enter Aadhaar mobile OTP. 4. Fill land details bank IFSC. 5. Submit CSC center help.

title: Crop Insurance Rice

solution: 1. Enroll before sowing Krishi Bhavan. 2. Pay premium 2% rice. 3. Lodge claim within 72hrs assessor visit. 4. Bank account linked.

title: Rice Seed Treatment
solution: 1. Soak seeds 18hrs cold water. 2. Drain shade 12hrs. 3. Mix Trichoderma 10g/kg seed. 4. Dry shade sow.

title: Soil Health Card
solution: 1. Apply soil sample Krishi Bhavan free. 2. Get card 3 months. 3. Follow recommendations 2 years valid. 4. GPS location mark.

title: Banana Desuckering
solution: 1. Keep 1 follower 2 sword suckers plant. 2. Remove monthly others. 3. Use spade dig deep. 4. Apply lime cut surface.

title: Coconut Replanting Subsidy

title: Coconut Basin Manuring

title: Rubber Replanting Scheme

title: Pepper Vine Training
solution: 1. Select 4 strong shoots primary. 2. Train opposite on pandal. 3. Prune weak shoots. 4. Tie loose regularly.

title: Spice Board Subsidy
user_query: Pepper disease quick wilt, help scheme?
solution: 1. Spice Board disease management scheme. 2. Resistant rootstock Panniyur1. 3. 50% subsidy planting. 4. Drenching chemical.

title: Cardamom Shade Management
solution: 1. Maintain 40-50% shade. 2. Plant Jeewamrutham trees. 3. Prune tall trees yearly. 4. Banana temporary shade.

title: Cardamom Rejuvenation
solution: 1. Spices Board rejuvenation scheme. 2. Remove 25% old clumps. 3. Plant micropropagated elite. 4. 75% subsidy.

title: Integrated Weed Management
solution: 1. Pre-emergence butachlor 1day after transplant. 2. Conoweeder 15 DAT. 3. Mulch organic. 4. Legume smother crop.

title: Post Harvest Drying
solution: 1. Dry threshing floor thin layer. 2. 14% moisture target. 3. Plastic tarp solar drying. 4. Moisture meter check.

title: Micro Irrigation Subsidy
solution: 1. Apply Krishi Bhavan PMKSY micro. 2. 55% subsidy drip 70% sprinkler. 3. Soil suitability test. 4. Vendor empanelled.

title: Farm Machinery Custom Hiring
solution: 1. Custom Hiring Center CHC app. 2. Book online Krishi Yantra. 3. Subsidy 40-50% machines. 4. GPS guided.

title: Staking Tomato
solution: 1. Bamboo 1.5m stake 45 days. 2. Tie stem coir weekly. 3. Prune side shoots. 4. 2 stems main.

title: Record Keeping Farm
solution: 1. Notebook crop wise input output. 2. Mobile app Kisan Suvidha. 3. Weekly update labor seeds. 4. Calculate B:C ratio.

title: Kisan Credit Card
user_query: Bank loan interest high cash needed?

solution: 1. Apply bank passbook land records. 2. 2 crore insurance cover. 3. 7% interest crop loan. 4. Renew yearly.

title: Coconut Pollination
solution: 1. Borax 50g/palm basin May. 2. NAA 10ppm spray flowering. 3. Balance NPK. 4. Remove male button.

title: Polyhouse Subsidy
solution: 1. NHM polyhouse scheme Krishi Bhavan. 2. 50% subsidy 500sqm min. 3. Drip fertigation included. 4. Bank loan tieup.

title: Pepper Drying Quality

title: FPO Formation
